# Tint Calendar

> Tint Calendar is a browser extension for Google Calendar that lets you customize and persistently apply colors to calendar events. It solves the limitation of Google Calendar's built-in color palette by offering a broader set of colors and the ability to save color choices per event.

## Pages

- [Home](https://ant0kr.github.io/tintcalendar/): Main landing page with features overview, installation instructions, and FAQ.
- [How to Add More Colors to Google Calendar](https://ant0kr.github.io/tintcalendar/how-to-add-more-colors-google-calendar/): Step-by-step guide explaining how users can get more color options in Google Calendar using the Tint Calendar extension.
- [Privacy Policy](https://ant0kr.github.io/tintcalendar/privacy/): Privacy policy for the Tint Calendar browser extension.

## About

- **Product**: Browser extension (Chrome Web Store)
- **Purpose**: Adds more color customization options to Google Calendar events
- **Platform**: Google Calendar (web)
- **License**: Free to use
